sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n79928" key="pa/somai" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάσομαι</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ᾰ]</pron>, <sense id="n79928.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πατέομαι</ref> </xr> :—but <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">πάσομαι</orth> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">[α]</foreign>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">πάομαι</ref></xr>.</sense> </entryFree>
